title: The Secret of the Antikythera Mechanism

scenes.text: This ancient device baffled scientists for centuries.

scenes.label: ASTROLOGICAL TOOL ONLY
scenes.text: Many believe it was just an astrological tool.

scenes.label: COMPLEX ASTRONOMICAL DEVICE
scenes.text: It's actually a complex astronomical calculator.

description: The Antikythera Mechanism is often misunderstood as a simple astrological tool, but its true purpose as an astronomical calculator reveals an advanced level of ancient technology. Dive deeper into this historical enigma and follow for more!
